title: ariocarpus fissuratus var. lloydii
intro: Ariocarpus fissuratus var. lloydii, also known as Lloyd's Live Cactus, is a rare and endangered species of cactus native to Mexico. It belongs to the family Cactaceae and is a variant of the Ariocarpus fissuratus, a type of living rock cactus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of Ariocarpus fissuratus var. lloydii include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and infections, and herbal preparations may involve the use of the plant's extracts or tinctures in topical applications or as a dietary supplement.
